chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-376 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 3067/24 3.For hearing of main case 03-02-2025 None present for the applicant. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far. Perusal of record reflects that since inception of filing of this application on 02.07.2024, neither applicant nor his counsel has taken any initiative to have the matter fixed in Court for issuance of notices to other side, which shows that either the applicant has lost his interest in proceeding with this matter or the purpose, for which instant application was filed, has been achieved. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
